excluded_as_leaky.Crowd_Density: deterministic transform of Occupancy_Rate x sensitivity
excluded_as_leaky.Recommendation: text generated FROM Risk_Level - pure leakage
excluded_as_leaky.Emergency_Type: kept only as binary Emergency_Active flag

notes: All features are observable at prediction time in a real operations room.
Occupancy_Rate kept despite being a Risk_Score component: it is directly observable (see Notebook 04 Section 6).
Visitors_Lag_1h/Delta_1h computed within (site, date) groups; first hour of day uses own value (delta=0).
Khamsin_Flag reconstructed from wind>=20 & visibility<=7.5 per EDA Section 4.
